name: @intentsolutionsio/docker-compose-generator
description: Generate Docker Compose configurations for multi-container applications with best practices

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install docker-compose-generator\\n  or /plugin install docker-compose-generator@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
